---
title: "Open Source Projects"
pagetitle: "Projects | Anthony Faustine"
description-meta: "Open-source ML libraries for forecasting, load monitoring, and production machine learning systems."

format:
  html:
    body-class: "projects"
    page-layout: full
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="projects.css">

toc: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(yaml)
projects_data <- yaml::read_yaml("data.yml")
num_projects <- length(projects_data$projects)
```

```{=html}
<div class="projects-timeline">
  <div class="timeline-header">
    <h1>Open Source Projects</h1>
    <p>Production-grade ML libraries from research to enterprise</p>
  </div>

  <div class="cards-container">

```

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
cat(sprintf('    <ul class="cards" style="--items: %d;">\n', num_projects))
for (i in 1:num_projects) {
  proj <- projects_data$projects[[i]]
  idx <- i - 1  # 0-indexed for CSS
  checked <- if (i == 1) "checked" else ""

  cat(sprintf('      <li style="--i: %d;">\n', idx))
  cat(sprintf('        <input type="radio" id="item-%d" name="gallery-item" %s>\n', idx, checked))
  cat(sprintf('        <label for="item-%d">%d</label>\n', idx, proj$year))
  cat(sprintf('        <h2>%s</h2>\n', proj$name))

  # Build description with key info
  desc <- sprintf('%s\n\n', proj$description)
  desc <- paste0(desc, sprintf('<strong>Updated:</strong> %s<br>\n', proj$updated))

  # Add links
  desc <- paste0(desc, '<strong>Links:</strong> ')
  link_labels <- sapply(proj$links, function(l) sprintf('<a href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener">%s</a>', l$url, l$label))
  desc <- paste0(desc, paste(link_labels, collapse=' • '))

  # Add paper link if available
  if (!is.null(proj$paper)) {
    desc <- paste0(desc, sprintf('<br><strong>Paper:</strong> <a href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener">%s</a>', proj$paper$url, proj$paper$title))
  }

  cat(sprintf('        <p>%s</p>\n', desc))
  cat('      </li>\n')
}
```

```{=html}
    </ul>
  </div>

  <div class="timeline-info">
    <p class="timeline-hint">Click a year to explore</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## Contributing

These projects welcome contributions and collaboration.

[Open an Issue](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm} [Submit a PR](https://github.com/sambaiga){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm}
